intent: Improve stage-five lower-field readability and alien ship path clarity without weakening Galaxian-family pressure, missile pace, routeability, or single-shot discipline.

stageBand.playerFeeling: Pressure rises without collapsing into unreadable collision stress.

proposedSpecDelta.summary: Create a measured candidate that lengthens and clarifies alien ship lower-field paths, preserves bottom wrap/reentry readability, and slightly widens readable escape/shot lanes without reducing pressure into an easy pattern.
preferredAdjustments: slightly lengthen stage-five scout dive duration or visible lower-field path commitment
reduce ambiguous overlap between diving aliens and enemy missile lanes
preserve enemy missile speed and single-shot player cadence
keep flagship/escort pressure visible as special pressure rather than generic crowding
make wrap/reentry paths easier to predict before any density increase
forbiddenShortcuts: do not lower enemy missile pace to make the lane easier
do not remove flagship/escort pressure as the primary relief mechanism
do not promote a candidate from visual object-track improvement alone
do not change score/result rules for this candidate

scoringOrResultImpact.rule: No score table, one-level completion, high-score, replay, or result-state behavior should change in this candidate.

audioHookImpact.candidateExpectation: If dive timing, escort joins, or wrap/reentry timing changes materially, the candidate must declare whether scoutDive, flagshipDive, escortJoin, or wrapReturn cue timing remains aligned or needs a follow-up audio pass.

visualHookImpact.candidateExpectation: Candidate evidence must include a stage-five contact sheet or gameplay capture that makes lower-field alien paths, missile lanes, and wrap/reentry commitments reviewable by a human.

routeabilityExpectation.read: A strong player should still feel pressure but see a route through stage-five lower-field threats.

collisionSafetyExpectation.read: Collision losses should not remain the dominant explanation for failed stage-five pressure.

paceExpectations.read: Alien ship movement should become clearer and closer without spending the already-strong missile pace signal.

evidenceToGenerate: stage-five professional gameplay capture or contact sheet
runtime-reference movement read for changed path/timing behavior
rollbackSignal: Revert or reject the runtime candidate if stage-five routeability drops below 6.6/10, collision-loss share rises above 0.278, missile pace falls below 9.7/10, single-shot cadence changes unintentionally, or browser/contact-sheet review shows lower-field threats are less readable despite metric lift.
nextStep: Build the candidate harness that can compare baseline and proposed runtime constants without changing shipped Guardians behavior.
